title: Orloj Retry/DeadLetter Overview
description: Dashboard spec artifact for runtime reliability checks using task observability APIs.

panels.title: DeadLetter Task Rate

notes: Use cmd/orloj-alertcheck for deterministic threshold evaluation and non-zero exit status.
